name: Devilish Eggs
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the eggs in half and remove the yolks from the whites.
2. Set the egg whites aside.
3. Mash the yolks with a fork.
4. Add mayonnaise and the remaining ingredients (Poupon mustard, Louisiana hot sauce, mashed pimentos, Dill relish) to the mashed yolks.
5. Mix until well combined.
6. Spoon the mixture back into the egg whites.
7. Serve on a bed of lettuce.
